mapper.update:
UPDATE expense
expense_time = #{expenseTime},
positive = #{positive},
type = #{type},
price = #{price},
label = #{label},
file_list = #{fileList},
where expense_id = #{expenseId} AND activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: SELECT expense.*, users.nickname as userNickname, users.avatar_url as userAvatar FROM expense LEFT JOIN users ON users.user_id = expense.user_id WHERE expense.expense_id = #{expenseId} LIMIT 1

SELECT expense.*, users.nickname as userNickname, users.avatar_url as userAvatar FROM expense LEFT JOIN users ON users.user_id = expense.user_id WHERE expense.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY expense.expense_time desc
SELECT * FROM expense WHERE expense.activity_id = #{activityId} AND positive = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expense(expense_id, type, price, label, user_id, activity_id, positive, expense_time, file_list) VALUES (#{expenseId}, #{type}, #{price}, #{label}, #{userId}, #{activityId}, #{positive}, #{expenseTime}, #{fileList})
mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.nickname as userNickname, u.avatar_url as userAvatar, a.activity_name as activityName FROM expense e LEFT JOIN users u ON u.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN activity a ON a.activity_id = e.activity_id WHERE e.activity_id IN ( SELECT aur.activity_id FROM activity_user_rel aur WHERE aur.user_id = #{userId} ) AND (e.label LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR e.type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY e.expense_time DESC LIMIT 100
